definition.en: A psychic gestalt is dependent upon matter, not for its identity but merely for its survival in the physical plane.
definition.zh: 一个心灵完形依赖于物质，并非为了其身份，而仅仅是为了其在物质层面的存续。

definition.en: The supraself is indeed a portion of a higher gestalt, which is part of yet another higher consciousness-gestalt.
definition.zh: 超我确实是更高完形的一部分，而该完形又是另一个更高意识完形的一部分。

definition.en: The complicated organism which is the human personality with its physical structure, has evolved, along with many other structures, a highly differentiated 'I' consciousness, whose very nature is such that it attempts to preserve the apparent boundaries of identity. But beneath this sophisticated gestalt are the simpler foundations of its being.
definition.zh: 人类人格及其物质结构这一复杂有机体，与许多其他结构一同演化出高度分化的‘我’意识，其本质如此，以至于它试图维护身份的明显界限。但在这精妙完形之下，是其存在更简单的基础。

definition.en: Your chair is only a chair by virtue of your own concept--gestalt, that is in itself severely limited due to the limitations of outer senses.
definition.zh: 你的椅子之所以是椅子，仅仅凭借你自己的概念完形——该完形本身因外在感官的局限而受到严重限制。

definition.en: The awareness and experience of this overall gestalt constantly change and grow. Again, there is no static god.
definition.zh: 这整体完形的觉知与体验不断变化和成长。再次强调，没有静止的神。

explanation: 「Gestalt（完形）」在赛斯资料中指的是由多个独立意识或能量单元，通过内在目的与价值完成法则，主动组合而成的更高阶、更复杂的整体结构。这个整体并非简单拼凑，而是具有独特的统一特性与智慧，同时每个组成部分依然保持其独立的身份与完整性。任何完形都不是静态的，它不断变化、成长，可以与其他完形结合而扩展自身，但不会因此减少或丧失原有的个性。物质世界中的物体、人体乃至自我意识，都是内在能量与意识通过这种完形过程构建出来的。甚至人类对“神”的概念，本质上也是一种更高层次的能量完形。关键在于，完形的形成不依赖物质来获得身份，物质只是它在物理层面存续的媒介。完形是无限可能的，

quotes.text: A psychic gestalt is dependent upon matter, not for its identity but merely for its survival in the physical plane. Psychic gestalts or identities or individualities are for all practical purposes immortal. They may join other gestalts but they will never be less than they once were. Identity then is never broken down. Any apparent breaking down is never an actual fact, as the personality could be thought of as a breaking down of the entity; but this is not so. The personality did not exist as such before its creation by the entity, and once it becomes an identity, it retains that individuality.
quotes.translation: 心灵完形依赖物质，并非为了其身份，而仅仅是为了在物质层面的存续。心灵完形或身份或个体性，实际上是不朽的。它们可以与其他完形结合，但绝不会变得比过去更少。因此，身份永远不会被分解。任何看似分解的情况都不是事实，就像人格可以被视为存有的分解，但事实并非如此。人格在被存有创造之前并不存在，而一旦它成为一个身份，它就保留了那个个体性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: We shall have a session dealing almost entirely with the nature of energy gestalts, and you will see that while these pyramid energy gestalts do, on the one hand, achieve a unitary character and sublime intelligence, on the other hand they form only an approximation of humanity's concept of a God. This unitary gestalt which we may call, and I prefer it to the word God, the primary energy gestalt.
quotes.translation: 我们将有一次几乎完全讨论能量完形本质的课程，你会看到，虽然这些金字塔能量完形一方面达到了统一的特性和崇高的智慧，但另一方面，它们只是人类对神的概念的一种近似。这个统一的完形，我们可以称之为，并且我更喜欢用这个词而不是神，即主要能量完形。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The gestalt patterns of which I have spoken is the basis here, and yet all members within such gestalts are themselves independent, possessing identity and separation even while they cooperate in a complicated pattern. It is arbitrary; that is, from your viewpoint you arbitrarily choose certain portions of reality and call them units, marking them off. But your divisions do not affect the nature of these gestalts, as my discussion speaks of separate universes without affecting the nature of any universe one whit.
quotes.translation: 我谈到的完形模式是这里的基础，然而这些完形中的所有成员本身都是独立的，拥有身份和分离，即使它们在复杂的模式中合作。这是任意的；也就是说，从你的视角来看，你任意选择现实的某些部分，称它们为单位，将它们划分出来。但你的划分并不影响这些完形的本质，正如我的讨论谈到分离的宇宙，却丝毫不影响任何宇宙的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: An awareness of the existence of the supraselfis in itself of great benefit. The author of Ruburt's new book calls this God, and I am simply telling you what it is. The supraselfis indeed a portion of a higher gestalt, which is part of yet another higher consciousness-gestalt. This is true. But this supraselfis you in a highly personal way, and it is superior in many aspects. It controls and organizes larger portions of action.
quotes.translation: 意识到超我的存在本身就有很大益处。鲁柏新书的作者称这为神，而我只是告诉你它是什么。超我确实是更高完形的一部分，而那个完形又是另一个更高意识完形的一部分。这是真的。但这个超我以高度个人化的方式就是你，它在许多方面更为优越。它控制和组织更大范围的活动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: As inner energy forms more complicated gestalts through the processes that I have earlier explained, then inner energy continues its communication with the physical matter that it creates about it. When inner energy desires to construct a more complicated gestalt, then it must telepathically communicate this intent and purpose through the matter which it collects about itself, forming a more complicated inner telepathic pattern first, that can then be filled in with physical matter. The manners in which telepathy operates are difficult to explain because of the divergence of definition held by the ego and by the inner self of any given individual. To the human being it must appear that telepathy is a mental or psychic communication occurring between two or more entirely separate selves. The ego, you see, has one definition for the self and its own idea of the limitations of itself.
quotes.translation: 当内在能量通过我之前解释的过程形成更复杂的完形时，内在能量会继续与它创造的周围物质进行沟通。当内在能量想要构建一个更复杂的完形时，它必须通过心灵感应将这个意图和目的传达给它收集在周围的物质，首先形成一个更复杂的内在心灵感应模式，然后可以用物质来填充。心灵感应运作的方式很难解释，因为任何特定个体的自我和内在自我对定义存在分歧。对人类来说，心灵感应必定看起来是发生在两个或多个完全分离的自我之间的精神或心灵沟通。你看，自我对自我有它自己的定义，以及对自己局限性的看法。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: A particular consciousness is a gestalt of these conceptual patterns; but there is nothing to prevent a consciousness from increasing itself by experiencing other conceptual patterns or patterns of perception. This assimilation would increase, not decrease, any given consciousness. We use, or you use, words merely as a convenience. We therefore say that a consciousness is a gestalt of patterns of perception, by which action knows itself. But the patterns of perceptions may grow, and the consciousness reach out. The consciousness has changed. It is no longer the same consciousness, since it has extended itself. Yet it is the same consciousness, on the other hand, because it is that which has extended itself. So words can confuse us.
quotes.translation: 特定的意识是这些概念模式的完形；但没有什么能阻止意识通过体验其他概念模式或感知模式来增强自身。这种同化会增加而非减少任何给定的意识。我们使用，或者你使用，词语仅仅是为了方便。因此，我们说意识是感知模式的完形，行动通过它认识自身。但感知模式可以增长，意识可以扩展。意识已经改变。它不再是同一个意识，因为它已经扩展了自身。然而，另一方面，它又是同一个意识，因为正是它扩展了自身。所以词语可能会让我们困惑。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It was composed of actual matter. As you should know, like all other atoms and molecules, its atoms and molecules had capsule comprehension, generalized consciousness. They formed themselves at Mark's instigation into a gestalt of physical construction; but the gestalt could not operate consistently or endure for any amount of physical time, in your field, because of the absence here of the greater data which is the property of the whole self, in its construction of a completed human form. This will take some reading over. Certain conditions, which we will discuss at length later, are necessary for a completely valid or effective materialization into human form.
quotes.translation: 它由实际物质构成。如你所知，与其他所有原子和分子一样，它的原子和分子具有胶囊式理解力与普遍意识。它们在马克的驱动下自行组合成物理构造的完形；但由于此处缺乏完整自我在构建完整人形时所拥有的更大数据，这个完形无法持续运作，也无法在你的场域中维持任何物理时间。这点需要反复阅读。某些条件——我们稍后将详细讨论——对于完全有效或成功的人形物质化是必要的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Also, for reasons that I will for now withhold, the psychic patterns within your physical universe are not maintained, as you know, indefinitely. As far as I know, no gestalt of any kind remains the same. But psychic gestalts develop in terms of value fulfillment, and it is known at the first appearance of a physical pattern how long the particular to-be-built-up gestalt will be maintained.
quotes.translation: 此外，出于我暂时保留的原因，你们物理宇宙中的心灵模式并不会无限期维持。据我所知，没有任何完形能保持原样。但心灵完形会以价值实现的方向发展，且当物理模式首次显现时，就能预知这个即将构建的特定完形能维持多久。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: But, you see, even this overall pyramid gestalt is not static. All or most concepts of a god deal with a static god and herein lies the main theological difficulties. The awareness and experience of this overall gestalt constantly change and grow. Again, there is no static god. When you say," This is God", then God is already something else. I am using the term God for simplicity's sake.
quotes.translation: 但你看，即便是这个整体金字塔完形也并非静止。所有或大多数神的概念都涉及静态神祇，这正是神学的主要困境所在。这个整体完形的觉知与经验不断变化成长。再次强调，不存在静态的神。当你说"这就是神"时，神已变成别的存在。我使用"神"这个术语只是为了简便。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: If you then realize that every physical particle contains its own inner and initial consciousness, then you will see that we have come full circle. The individual or the self is all important. It operates to form as complicated a gestalt as possible, following the law of value fulfillment, and yet in so doing it does not either invade, deny or negate other individual consciousness. It is limitless because there are no limits to the possibilities of its value fulfillment, or to the number of gestalts which it can form.
quotes.translation: 若你意识到每个物理粒子都包含其内在的初始意识，就会明白我们已形成完整循环。个体或自我至关重要。它遵循价值实现法则运作，尽可能形成复杂的完形，但在此过程中既不侵犯、否定也不抹杀其他个体意识。它是无限的，因为其价值实现的可能性没有限制，所能形成的完形数量也没有上限。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The following basic subjects are necessary for an understanding of what we are trying to say, particularly for any practical application: the construction of physical matter; the psychological and electrical gestalt that results in the formation of a self; the nature of the dream universe; the electrical system, as it is related to both the physical universe and the inner psychic gestalt; the nature of action; mental enclosures; mental genes; and again, all of these subjects in relationship to their reality as action.
quotes.translation: 要理解我们试图传达的内容，特别是进行实际应用时，以下基础主题必不可少：物理物质的构造；形成自我的心理与电力完形；梦境宇宙的本质；与物理宇宙及内在心灵完形相关的电力系统；行动的本质；心灵围场；心灵基因；以及所有这些主题与其作为行动的现实之间的关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: During our next session we will go more deeply into those pyramid gestalts of which we have spoken in the past, and perhaps consider from another viewpoint entirely the scope and nature that make up the idea of gods. Within certain frameworks these pyramid gestalts do have an electrical reality, but their existence goes beyond not the range but the nature of electrical reality. And because of the strength of their intensity, they are projected within every other field of actuality that exists.
quotes.translation: 在下节课中，我们将更深入探讨过去提及的那些金字塔完形，或许从完全不同的视角审视构成神祇概念的范围与本质。在某些框架内，这些金字塔完形确实具有电力实相，但其存在超越的并非电力实相的范围，而是其本质。因其强度之强，它们被投射到所有其他存在的实相场域中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The longer the impeding action is accepted as a part of the self, the more serious the problem. The impeding action or illness however is not a part of the basic personality structure, or action gestalt, which is composed of action patterns formed since birth. Compared to this truly astounding structure, that is the result of the memory of every atom and molecule, this impeding action is relatively unimportant, and when correct methods are used, it can be dislodged without too much difficulty.
quotes.translation: 阻碍性行动被接纳为自我一部分的时间越长，问题就越严重。然而，阻碍性行动或疾病并非基本人格结构或行动完形的一部分——后者由出生以来形成的行动模式构成。与这个真正惊人的结构（它是每个原子和分子记忆的产物）相比，这种阻碍性行动相对无关紧要，只要使用正确方法，就能毫不费力地将其移除。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Your senses do not perceive this. They are far too slow. At some time your instruments may discover this interval. Nevertheless, for all the appearance of permanence and rigidity, your chair is only a chair by virtue of your own concept--gestalt, that is in itself severely limited due to the limitations of outer senses. I have mentioned that your cause and effect theory is in itself antiquated and distorted. Matter in itself does not decay, since it does not exist as one object long enough.
quotes.translation: 你们的感官无法感知这一点。它们实在太慢了。有朝一日你们的仪器或许能发现这个间隙。然而，尽管看似永恒而坚固，你们的椅子之所以成为椅子，完全依赖于你们自己的概念——完形，而由于外在感官的局限，这个完形本身也受到严重限制。我曾提到你们的因果理论本身已过时且扭曲。物质本身不会腐朽，因为它作为单一物体存在的时间根本不够长。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The physical body is formed about its electrical counterpart, yet they are both intertwined in completely different dimensions. All the knowledge gained by the present ego is retained in electrical form, as is all experience so retained. The camouflage material will be discarded as a physical gestalt, as far as the individual is concerned. The matter of the physical body will simply be used in other gestalts, in the manner that I have explained in earlier sessions.
quotes.translation: 物质身体围绕其电性对应体形成，但两者却交织在完全不同的维度中。当前自我获得的所有知识都以电性形式保留，所有经验也是如此。就个体而言，伪装物质将作为物质完形被舍弃。物质身体的物质将简单地用于其他完形，正如我在早期课程中解释过的方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Keep in mind here, though a discussion will wait for quite a while, that a like relationship occurs between the dream universe and the world of negative matter. There is surrounding this threefold system an envelope, so to speak, of uncamouflaged psychic phenomena. In other words, psychic energy gestalts, of which we will speak much later. They are important however; and from what you now know you realize that these energy forms represent mental enclosure units, operating in the same manner as our earlier ones of which we spoke when discussing the early development of energy within the physical field.
quotes.translation: 这里请记住（尽管详细讨论要等很久），梦境宇宙与负物质世界之间也存在类似关系。可以说，这个三重系统周围包裹着一层未经伪装的灵性现象外衣。换言之，即灵性能量完形——我们将在很久以后讨论它们。但它们很重要；根据你们目前所知，你们会意识到这些能量形式代表心智封闭单元，其运作方式与我们讨论物质场域内能量早期发展时提到的早期单元相同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: When action is allowed to flow unimpeded, the cooperation that is necessary to maintain the efficiency of the gestalt is maintained. It is most frequently the error of the ego, who upon many occasions attempts to deny its dependency upon this cooperation, that sets up impediments, and sets up counter suggestions that can be somewhat considered cancerous, in that if it had its way the ego would envelop all other aspects of the whole organism, and run riot.
quotes.translation: 当行动得以无阻碍地流动时，维持完形效率所需的协作便得以保持。最常是自我的错误——它在许多场合试图否认对这种协作的依赖——设置了障碍，并建立了可被视为类似癌变的反向暗示，因为如果任其发展，自我将吞噬整个有机体的所有其他面向，并肆意妄为。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The capacity and mechanism necessary to project idea into physical matter is, therefore, present in the individual atom and molecule. I mentioned how the atoms and molecules combine to form cells, while each individual atom and molecule does not give up its own uniqueness, but forms rather a gestalt, so that a cell is indeed a psychic gestalt given physical construction through the capacity that exists within each individual component.
quotes.translation: 因此，将意念投射为物质形态所需的能力和机制存在于每个原子和分子中。我曾提到原子和分子如何结合形成细胞，而每个原子和分子并未放弃其独特性，而是形成一种完形，因此细胞确实是一种灵性完形，通过每个个体组成部分内在的能力获得物质构造。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Basically, the psyche is a manifestation of pure energy in a particular form. It is very difficult to consider its experience outside of the framework familiar to you. You demand a certain preciseness of definition and terminology. That vocabulary automatically structures the information, of course. The psyche is a conglomeration of energy gestalts. To understand that, you must realize that pure energy has such transforming pattern-forming propensities that it always appears as its manifestations. It becomes its "camouflages."
quotes.translation: 基本上，心灵是纯粹能量以特定形式的表现。在你所熟悉的框架之外，很难考虑其经验。你要求定义和术语的某种精确性。当然，这种词汇会自动构建信息。心灵是能量完形的集合体。要理解这一点，你必须认识到纯粹能量具有如此强大的转化模式形成倾向，以至于它总是以其表现的形式出现。它变成了它的"伪装"。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: All of this presented a quite erroneous picture. Physically speaking, earth itself has its own kind of gestalt consciousness. If you must, then think of that earth consciousness as grading (spelled) upward in great slopes of awareness from relatively "inert" particles of dust and stone through the mineral, vegetable, and animal kingdoms. Even then, remember that those kingdoms are not so separate after all. Each one is highly related to each of the others. Nothing happens in one such kingdom that does not affect the others. A great, gracious cooperation exists between those seemingly separate systems, however. If you will remember that even atoms and molecules have consciousness, then it will be easier for you to understand that there is indeed a certain kind of awareness that unites these kingdoms.
quotes.translation: 所有这些都呈现了一个相当错误的画面。从物理上来说，地球本身也有其自己的完形意识。如果你必须这样想，那么就把这种地球意识想象为从相对"惰性"的尘埃和石头粒子，通过矿物、植物和动物王国，以巨大的意识斜坡向上分级。即便如此，请记住那些王国毕竟并非如此分离。每一个都与其他高度相关。一个王国中发生的任何事情都会影响其他王国。然而，在这些看似分离的系统之间存在着一种伟大而仁慈的合作。如果你记得连原子和分子都有意识，那么你就更容易理解确实存在某种意识将这些王国联合起来。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 705
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Physically speaking, and generally, your body is composed of grasses and ants and rocks and beasts and birds, for in one way or another all biological matter is related.9 In certain terms, through your experience, birds and rocks speak alphabets -- and certain portions of your own being fly or creep as birds or insects,10 forming the great gestalt of physical experience. It is fashionable to say: "You are what you eat" semicolon; that, for example, "You must not eat meat because you are killing the animals, and this is wrong." But in deeper terms, physically and biologically, the animals are born from the body of the earth, which is composed of the corpses of men and women as much as it is of other matter. The animals consume you, then, as often as you consume them, and they are as much a part of your humanity as you are a part of their so called animal nature.
quotes.translation: 从物理上来说，一般来说，你的身体由草、蚂蚁、岩石、野兽和鸟类组成，因为生物物质以某种方式都是相关的。在某些术语中，通过你的经验，鸟类和岩石会说话字母——而你存在的某些部分像鸟或昆虫一样飞翔或爬行，形成物理经验的伟大完形。流行说法是："你吃什么就是什么"；例如，"你不能吃肉，因为你正在杀死动物，这是错误的。"但在更深层的术语中，从物理和生物学上来说，动物是从地球的身体中诞生的，而地球的身体由男女的尸体和其他物质一样构成。那么，动物消耗你的次数和你消耗它们的次数一样多，它们是你人性的一部分，就像你是它们所谓动物性的一部分一样。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: However, as we know the cell is a part of the body, giving nourishment and receiving nourishment from it. Its outer rim, more correctly, connects it to the body. Parts of it literally travel throughout the body. It is yet an individual. It possesses condensed consciousness and comprehension, it partakes of value fulfillments through the gestalt of which it would not otherwise be capable. If you considered the body as a closed system, which it is not, then you could say that the self of the cell had as its limitations only the limits of the whole closed system. But the system is not closed, and through the participation of the cell in the activities of the body, which is an open system, then you could truly say that the cell itself had no limitations.
quotes.translation: 然而，正如我们所知，细胞是身体的一部分，给予身体营养并从身体接收营养。更准确地说，它的外缘将其连接到身体。它的部分实际上在全身旅行。它仍然是一个个体。它拥有浓缩的意识与理解，通过它原本无法做到的完形参与价值实现。如果你把身体视为一个封闭系统（而它并非如此），那么你可以说细胞的自我只有整个封闭系统的限制作为其限制。但系统不是封闭的，通过细胞参与身体的活动（这是一个开放系统），那么你可以真正地说细胞本身没有限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I have told you that energy always regenerates itself, but the implications here psychically are astounding, as the inward energy forms gestalt after gestalt; and each gestalt itself then continues to go on, itself regenerating, forming new personalities which are never destroyed.
quotes.translation: 我告诉过你能量总是自我再生，但这里在心灵上的含义是惊人的，因为内在能量形成完形接完形；而每个完形本身随后继续存在，自我再生，形成永远不会被摧毁的新人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The basic psychological structures available have definite solidity, depth, mass, et cetera, in the psychological perspective, and they may be formed into numberless gestalt patterns, which are then constructed physically. The variations of construction are endless. There is nothing to force an individual for example to form psychological gestalts of hate and fear from the basic structure of consciousness survival.
quotes.translation: 可用的基本心理结构在心理视角中具有明确的坚实性、深度、质量等，它们可以被形成为无数完形模式，然后被物理构建。构建的变化是无穷无尽的。例如，没有任何东西迫使个体从意识生存的基本结构中形成仇恨和恐惧的心理完形。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Personalities are composed of action and of psychic components. This is what you are. It is what I am. There are at all times more various kinds of personalities than there are flower seeds--different varieties. Some mature and develop, some are in ways I have not yet explained, transitory. They merge into other gestalts, but what they are is never destroyed. They operate independently while part of other gestalts.
quotes.translation: 人格由行动与心灵成分组成。这就是你的本质，也是我的本质。任何时候存在的人格种类都比花种更多——不同变体。有些成熟发展，有些以我尚未解释的方式呈现为过渡形态。它们融入其他完形，但本质永不消亡。当作为其他完形的一部分时，它们仍独立运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The complicated organism which is the human personality with its physical structure, has evolved, along with many other structures, a highly differentiated "I" consciousness, whose very nature is such that it attempts to preserve the apparent boundaries of identity. To do so it chooses between actions, for the very choice, or act of choosing, and ability to do so, represents the nature of identity. But beneath this sophisticated gestalt are the simpler foundations of its being, and indeed the very acceptance of all stimuli without which identity would be impossible.
quotes.translation: 作为人类人格的复杂有机体及其生理结构，已与众多其他结构共同演化出高度分化的"我"意识——其本质特性在于试图维系身份认同的显性边界。为此它在行动间进行选择，因为选择本身、选择行为及选择能力，正代表着身份认同的本质。但在这精妙完形之下，存在着更简单的存在根基——事实上，正是对所有刺激的接纳，才使身份认同成为可能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: As far as self and not-self are concerned, the unit of self is organized, as you know, by the inner ego, which directs the whole energy field. The outer ego directs the manipulation of this gestalt in the physical universe. The outer ego is rather more tied to physical properties, and yet it can directly experience inner reality by a change of focus through aligning itself with the inner ego, focusing its energies with the inner rather than the outer senses. This is by far the most advantageous method of experiencing inner reality, because the outer ego is therefore consciously aware of what has been going on, and can use such knowledge in its own sphere.
quotes.translation: 就自我与非我而言，如你所知，自我单元由内在自我组织，它统御着整个能量场。外在自我则主导此完形在物质宇宙中的运作。外在自我更受制于物质属性，但通过调整焦点与内在自我对齐，将能量聚焦于内在而非外在感官，它仍能直接体验内在实相。这是体验内在实相最有利的方式，因为外在自我能清醒意识到所发生之事，并在自身领域运用这些知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: In the beginning there was instead, once more, a divine psychological gestalt--and by that I mean a being whose reality escapes the definition of the word "being," since it is the source from which all being emerges. That being exists in a psychological dimension (long pause), a spacious present, in which everything that was or is or will be (in your terms) is kept in immediate attention, poised in a divine context that is characterized (long pause, eyes closed) by such a brilliant concentration that the grandest and the lowliest, the largest and the smallest, are equally held in a multiloving constant focus.
quotes.translation: 最初存在的，再次是一个神圣心理完形——我意指其真实超越"存在"一词定义的存有，因为它是所有存在的源头。此存有存在于心理维度（长停顿），一个广袤当下，其中一切过去、现在或未来（以你们的时间观）皆被即时关注，悬置于神圣语境中——其特征（闭目长停顿）是璀璨专注，使最崇高与最卑微、最宏大与最微小，皆被多重心爱恒定焦点所包容。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your ego gains assurance from what seems to be the memory of its immediate past. A man who loses memory of past events feels insecure and lost, but other types of personality gestalts operate far differently. Instead of a time sequence that governs or seems to govern thought, mental activity of any kind, and overt action, you have associative processes, offshoots, and possibilities. To some extent you can gain an idea of this through an examination of your own stream of consciousness. But the comparison is highly superficial, for here too continuity reigns, even though associations are given greater play.
quotes.translation: 你的自我从看似对即时过往的记忆中获得确信。失去过往记忆的人会感到不安与迷失，但其他类型的人格完形运作方式截然不同。取代支配（或看似支配）思想、任何心智活动及外在行为的时间序列，你拥有联想过程、分支与可能性。某种程度上，通过检视自身意识流可略窥其貌，但这种比较极为肤浅，因为即便联想被赋予更大发挥空间，连续性依然主导。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: But identity is much more than this, and basic identity, while using the perceptive abilities, is not that dependent upon them. It is true that the personality is a gestalt, and that every identity has any number of potential egos. It is also true that on occasion one potential ego will take over from another. But this is all highly simplified, for the ego structure is not one thing, but a changing, never constant, actually quite informal grouping of psychological patterns. Each ego uses and interprets the organisms perceiving apparatus in a way that in the overall is characteristic and distinctive.
quotes.translation: 但身份认同远不止于此，基本身份认同虽运用感知能力，却并不依赖它们。诚然人格是完形，每个身份认同都拥有无数潜在自我。诚然有时某个潜在自我会接替另一个。但这已极度简化，因为自我结构并非单一实体，而是不断变化、永不恒定、实则非正式的心理模式集合。每个自我都以整体上独特的方式运用并诠释有机体的感知装置。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: These personality intensities are themselves formed within ranges that would appear minute, but contain within them, truly, eons of experience. In our further discussions concerning the nature of electrical reality, we will also come closer to an understanding of those pyramid gestalts of which I have spoken. See the 81st session for some material on psychic pyramid gestalts.
quotes.translation: 这些人格强度本身形成于看似微小的范围内，但其中确实蕴含着无数纪元的经验。在我们后续关于电性实相本质的讨论中，也将更接近理解我所提及的那些金字塔形完形。关于心灵金字塔完形的资料，可参阅第81节。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In the beginning CU's, then, units of consciousness, existing within a divine psychological gestalt, endowed with the unimaginable creativity of that sublime identity, began themselves to create, to explore, and to fulfill those innate values by which they were characterized. Operating both as waves and particles, directed in part by their own creative restlessness, and directed in part by the unquenchable creativity of All That Is, they embarked upon the project that brought time and space and your entire [universe] into being. They were the first entities, then.
quotes.translation: 最初，存在于神圣心理完形中的意识单位（CU），被赋予那崇高本体难以想象的创造力，它们开始自行创造、探索并实现那些构成其特质的固有价值。这些单位以波与粒子的双重形态运作，部分受自身创造性躁动驱使，部分受一切万有不可遏制的创造力引导，由此开启了创造时间、空间及整个宇宙的工程。它们便是最初的存有。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: But a child born to two parents is also an offspring of the earth, its tissues as surely a part of earth as any tree or flower, or burst of ocean spray. A human child, true; but an offspring in which the entire history of the earth is involved -- a new creation arising not just from two parents, but from the entire gestalt of nature, from which the parents themselves once emerged; a private yet public affair in which the physical elements of earth become individualized; in which psyche and earth cooperate in a birth that is human, and in other terms, divine.
quotes.translation: 但由双亲所生的孩子同样是大地之子嗣，其组织与树木、花朵或飞溅的浪花一样，确然是大地的一部分。诚然是人类孩童，却承载着地球全部历史的产物——这新生命不仅源自双亲，更源于整个自然完形，而双亲本身亦曾从这完形中涌现。这是私密又公开的历程：地球的物理元素在此个体化，心灵与大地在人类（以另一种说法则是神圣）的诞生中协同运作。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The cells and molecules, forming their psychic gestalt into a particular human physical structure, are separated from what you might call the outer environment, and yet they are also connected to the outer environment more than they are separated from it. It is the inner ego, and the inner vitality and the inner ego's determination, along with the cooperation of all the cells that compose the physical body, that enables such a particular structure as the human body to exist as a separate construction, and to maintain the necessary sense of identity.
quotes.translation: 细胞与分子将其心理完形塑造成特定人类物理结构时，虽与你所谓的外在环境分离，实则与外在环境的联结远胜于分离。正是内在自我、内在生命力与内在自我的决心，配合构成肉身的全体细胞协作，才使人体这般特殊结构得以作为独立构造存在，并维系必要的身份认同感。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: We are dealing here, again, merely with the various aspects of action. As a personality itself is an action gestalt, within the inner self there is a capsule comprehension of the purposes and intents of the whole personality. These are indeed within the very structure, both psychic and physical, of the personality itself. The ego, on its own as a separate unit, does not have such data, although since it is after all a portion of the whole self, it does have such information available. But when it acts as a unit it does not use such information.
quotes.translation: 我们在此再次探讨的仅是行动的不同面向。既然人格本身即是行动完形，内在自我中便存有对整个人格目的与意图的胶囊式理解。这些理解确实存在于人格自身的心理与物理结构中。自我作为独立单元时并不掌握此类数据，尽管它终究是整体自我的一部分而能获取这些信息，但当其以单元形态运作时，并不运用这些信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: This point is extremely important. All consciousness, therefore, either of a complicated psychic gestalt such as a man or animal, or of simpler gestalts such as an individual cell or molecule, nevertheless operate in and form about themselves mental or psychic enclosures, within which is naturally contained the capsule comprehension which is an attribute of all energy.
quotes.translation: 此点至关重要。因此，无论是以人类或动物为代表的复杂心理完形，还是以单个细胞或分子为代表的简单完形，所有意识都在自身周围运作并构建心理或心灵围场，其中自然包含着作为一切能量属性的胶囊式理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: A personality in the primary gestalt is indeed focused upon your present plane of reality, but to suppose that the whole primary gestalt is so focused represents mankind's ego playing with one of its most preposterous proposals.
quotes.translation: 初级完形中的人格确实聚焦于你们当前的实相层面，但认为整个初级完形都如此聚焦，这代表了人类自我在玩弄其最荒谬的主张之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I have explained somewhat earlier how the gestalt ego consciousness was formed, and to some degree explained its psychic composition, but there is much more to be said here. There is a steady and unwavering cooperation that exists, and it is the basis of your physical universe. You do not see this cooperation. Your senses are rather more equipped to notice difference and divergence than sameness; but nevertheless the cooperation of all conscious entities provides physical objects with whatever appearance of permanence they have.
quotes.translation: 我先前已部分解释过完形自我意识是如何形成的，也一定程度说明了其心灵构成，但这里还有更多需要阐述。存在一种稳定而坚定的合作，它是你们物质宇宙的基础。你们看不见这种合作。你们的感官更擅长察觉差异与分歧而非相同之处；但所有意识实体的合作，却为物质对象提供了它们所拥有的任何表面上的持久性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Knowledge does not exist independently of the one who knows. Someone gave Cayce the material. It did not come out of thin air. It came from an excellent source, a pyramid gestalt personality, with definite characteristics, but the alien nature of the personality was too startling to Cayce, and he could not perceive it. (Pause.) I am giving you the material through a personality that you can understand; one that is mine, one of my favorite selves. (Smile.) In this way the point is made so that it is clear.
quotes.translation: 知识并非独立于认知者而存在。有人给了凯西那些资料。它们并非凭空而来。它们来自一个极佳的源头——一个金字塔完形人格，具有明确特征，但该人格的异类本质对凯西而言过于惊骇，他无法感知到它。（停顿）我正通过一个你们能理解的人格——即属于我的、我最钟爱的自我之一——来传递这些资料。（微笑）如此便能清晰阐明要点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The nature of matter is an extremely difficult sore point in your scientific circles. Incidentally, for the benefit of the record: As yet Ruburt has read no books or information concerning the subject. This does not mean that he will not, or should not. To the contrary, since we have a gestalt here his conscious as well as subconscious grasp of information is important. We will take many leaps from it, and his familiarity with many subjects will actually help to make communication from me more automatic.
quotes.translation: 物质的本质是你们科学界一个极其棘手的痛点。顺便提一句，为记录起见：鲁柏至今尚未阅读任何关于此主题的书籍或资料。这并不意味着他不会或不应该读。恰恰相反，既然我们在此构成一个完形，他有意识及潜意识层面对信息的掌握都很重要。我们将从中做出许多跳跃，而他对于诸多主题的熟悉程度，实际上将有助于使来自我的沟通更加自动化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You must also realize that the entity who became her son also chose the circumstances, knowing of them in advance, for his own purposes. There are many character aspects to be considered here. For if each personality is an energy gestalt, then also each family group is also an energy gestalt. The actions and interactions form its characteristics and nature.
quotes.translation: 你们也必须认识到，成为她儿子的那个存有也预先知晓这些情境，并出于自身目的选择了它们。这里有许多性格层面需要考虑。因为如果每个人格都是一个能量完形，那么每个家庭群体同样也是一个能量完形。其行动与互动构成了它的特性与本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: And again, dreams are themselves never completed, but continue on whether or not your perception of them continues. For dreams also are gestalts. When you look into the mirror you see the camouflage image. You do not see the ego, though you know that it exists. But the idea, ego, is in itself an arbitrary unit chosen for particular reasons. It is not a thing. You have drawn lines, imaginary lines, and made an arbitrary boundary. This does not mean that the ego does not exist.
quotes.translation: 再者，梦境本身永不完结，无论你们对其感知是否持续，它们仍在继续。因为梦也是完形。当你们照镜子时，看到的是伪装影像。你们看不见自我，尽管知道它存在。但"自我"这个观念本身，是为特定原因而选定的一个任意单位。它并非一个物件。你们画出了线条——想象的线条——并划定了一个任意的边界。这并不意味着自我不存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This is the ideal circumstance, for when this is the case then the ego listens to the inner self, and then directs its energy outward in a way that is beneficial for the whole gestalt framework. What you call negative suggestions are often judgments of the ego, for suggestion works from the ego to the subconscious, as well as it works the other way around. Such suggestions made by the ego can indeed be caught, and positive or constructive suggestions given to replace them.
quotes.translation: 这是理想的情况，因为当如此时，自我会倾听内在自己，然后以有益于整体完形架构的方式向外引导其能量。你们所谓的负面暗示往往是自我的判断，因为暗示既从自我运作到潜意识，也反向运作。自我所做的这类暗示确实可以被捕捉到，并用正面或建设性的暗示来取代它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: As the ego becomes certain of its strength, then it will allow the self to expand. I mentioned in our last session that the scientists did not realize that man has indeed evolved since the development of the human brain. For it has learned to form literally millions of new connections, meanings and concepts, new gestalts that have indeed made man something quite different than he was. All of these are new electromagnetic patterns which are now indelibly a part of the race.
quotes.translation: 随着自我确认其力量，它便会允许自己扩展。我在上一节课中提到，科学家们并未意识到人类自大脑发展以来确实已经进化。因为大脑已学会形成数百万个新连接、新意义和新概念，这些新完形确实使人类与过去截然不同。所有这些新电磁模式如今已成为种族不可磨灭的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: None of us are ever equipped, for general purposes, to perceive reality in all of its forms. The pyramid gestalts can do this, and we help the pyramid gestalts perform this feat. But as a rule we must pick and choose. There is too much for any consciousness to digest except those so highly developed that even I know little of them.
quotes.translation: 我们中没有任何人，就一般目的而言，能够感知所有形式的实相。金字塔完形能做到这一点，我们帮助金字塔完形完成这项壮举。但通常我们必须有所选择。任何意识能消化的信息都太多了，除非是那些高度发展的意识，连我对它们也所知甚少。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The differences among all species are caused by this kind of organization, so that areas of choice are clearly drawn, and areas of free activity clearly specified. The entire gestalt of probable actions, therefore, is already focused to some degree in the species' differentiations. In the vast structure of probable activity, however, far more differentiation was still necessary, and this is provided for through the inner passageways of reincarnational existence.
quotes.translation: 所有物种间的差异都是由这种组织方式造成的，因此选择区域被清晰划定，自由活动区域被明确界定。因此，可能行动的整个完形在物种分化中已在一定程度上被聚焦。然而，在可能活动的庞大结构中，仍需要更多的分化，而这通过转世存在的内在通道得以实现。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You recall, I am sure, the material concerning the gestalt of the physical body. Here suggestion constantly plays its part in the formation of the tissues, and in all other such areas of development and growth. There are various manners in which these inner suggestions are translated from inner pure energy form into the electrical and chemical systems which compose the physical organisms, and it is possible for errors of translation to occur along these lines.
quotes.translation: 我相信你们还记得关于物质身体完形的资料。在这里，暗示不断在组织形成以及所有其他此类发展与成长领域中发挥作用。这些内在暗示从内在纯能量形式转化为构成物质有机体的电化学系统，有多种方式，而沿着这些路径可能发生转化错误。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Beyond certain levels it is almost meaningless to speak in terms of particles, but I will for now use the term "invisible particles" because you are familiar with it. Invisible particles, then, form the foundation of your world. The invisible particles that I am referring to, however, have the ability to transform themselves into mass,1 or to divest themselves of it. And the invisible particles of which I speak not only possess consciousness--but each one is, if you will, a seed that contains within itself a potential for an infinite number of gestalts. Each such invisible particle contains within itself the potential (pause) to embark upon an infinite number of probable variations of consciousness. To that degree such psychological particles are at that stage unspecialized, while they contain within themselves the innate ability to specialize in whatever direction becomes suitable.
quotes.translation: 超越某些层次后，用粒子术语来讨论几乎毫无意义，但我现在将使用"无形粒子"一词，因为你们熟悉它。那么，无形粒子构成了你们世界的基础。然而，我所指的无形粒子有能力将自己转化为质量，或卸除质量。而且，我所说的无形粒子不仅拥有意识——而且每一个，如果你愿意，都是一个种子，其内包含着无限数量完形的潜能。每个这样的无形粒子其内都包含着（停顿）踏上无限数量可能意识变奏的潜能。在这个程度上，这类心理粒子在那个阶段是未特化的，同时其内包含着向任何适合方向特化的天生能力。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Here in a simple manner is a case in point. The molecules and atoms and even smaller particles, all contain their separate consciousness. They form into cells. Now, although the cells maintain individuality and do not lose any of their abilities, in this formation into cells there is actually a pooling of individual consciousness of atoms and molecules into, and to form, an individual cellular consciousness. Here the consciousness of each individual molecule or atom, by this psychic gestalt, gains immeasurably. The combination of individual consciousness into a combination forms a new, enlarged, more powerful cellular consciousness that is capable of much more experience and fulfillment than would be possible for the isolated atom or molecule.
quotes.translation: 这里有个简单的例子。分子、原子甚至更小的粒子都拥有各自的意识。它们组合成细胞。虽然细胞保持个体性且不丧失任何能力，但在形成细胞的过程中，原子和分子的个体意识实际上汇聚融合，形成一种新的细胞意识。通过这种心灵完形，每个分子或原子的意识都获得了无可估量的增益。个体意识的组合形成了一种新的、更强大的细胞意识，它能体验和实现比孤立原子或分子多得多的可能性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I do not believe that Dunne understood this. There is no serialization as he imagined, after a certain point, simply because this progression of selves through various times in a serial fashion is no longer necessary. The selves reach a point which is not a theoretical point, but a particular mathematically existent point, whereby these times and selves simply become one, or in our terms, an entity. I must stress that individuality is never lost. But this is too complicated a subject to cover this evening. We have explained it rather adequately in terms of action however, and gestalts of selves do not imply a giving-up of individuality at all. It should be remembered here that reincarnation is simply a fact, and one which is not accepted by Priestley or Dunne.
quotes.translation: 我不认为邓恩理解这一点。不存在他想象的那种序列化，在某个点之后，这种自我以序列方式穿越不同时间的进程就不再必要了。自我会达到一个点——这不是理论上的点，而是数学上实际存在的点——在此处这些时间和自我简单地合为一体，用我们的术语来说，成为一个存有。我必须强调个体性从未丧失。但今晚这个话题过于复杂无法详述。不过我们已用行动的概念相当充分地解释过，自我的完形绝不意味着放弃个体性。这里应记住，转世只是一个事实，而普里斯特利和邓恩都不接受这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You are all pieces, you see, of the whole; but you are not all the same pieces of the whole, but rather individualized pieces of the whole. You do not all fit together like a crossword puzzle that any idiot can put together. You are still highly individualized portions of the whole. You are the whole, but you are all highly unique. You fit into different portions of the whole. The self or structure or personality travels outward and inward and (if you will forgive me) in all directions. It is action. It constantly changes. Each self as you know it has its own abilities and inclinations and sympathies. It has its own particular place within the Pyramid Gestalt. It can contact that whole self which in your terms does not yet exist, but which is of course always present. In your search you must contact that whole portion of yourself toward which you are growing--toward which I hope you are growing. This is your individual circuit, so to speak. All ways are one way, but your way is your own way. And you can travel no other. He is--Baba--highly advanced indeed. He is a way, however; he is not the end. He is not completed. He is right, but he is wrong in taking pleasure in his rightness. (I have never been known for my own Humilitye. It ill-behooves me to speak.) Nevertheless he who is and knows that he is, is. He has no need for words and he has no need to proclaim himself, for he speaks without the necessity for words and he is heard. Those who are really heard have no need for words. I speak to you now in words because without words now, there would not be the necessary understanding that must be reached before I can become wordless.
quotes.translation: 你们都是整体的碎片，但并非相同的碎片，而是整体中个体化的碎片。你们不像拼图游戏那样可以随意拼合。你们仍是整体中高度个体化的部分。你们是整体，但都极其独特。你们嵌入整体的不同部分。自我、结构或人格向外向内（请原谅我这么说）向所有方向延伸。它是行动。它不断变化。你所知的每个自我都有其能力、倾向和共鸣。它在金字塔完形中有其特定位置。它可以接触那个在你们看来尚未存在、但始终在场的整体自我。在你们的探索中，必须接触那个你们正在成长——我希望你们正在成长——朝向的自我整体部分。可以说，这是你们各自的回路。所有道路都是同一条路，但你的路是你自己的路。你无法走其他路。巴巴确实高度进化。但他是一条路，而非终点。他尚未完成。他是对的，但以正确为乐则是错的。（我从不以谦逊著称。说这话不太合适。）然而，存在且知晓自身存在者，就是存在。他无需言语，无需宣告自己，因为他无需言语就能言说，且被听见。真正被听见的人无需言语。我现在用言语对你们说话，是因为在达到无言境界之前，必须建立必要的理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now. Some females will identify in the dream with the bull. In dreams many females will have what you would call male reactions. Some males in dreams will have what you would call female reactions. The bull could come also to represent a person the dreamer considers bullheaded. A bullfighting dream might be formed. The variations are endless. Some generic images will have strong personal significance because of past life experiences. The generic image does not only color the dream state, however. These images are the first basis from which thought evolved. This would almost amount to a cellular thinking process, but it is actually a gestalt of relatedness in which cellular comprehension was, and is, passed throughout the physical organism.
quotes.translation: 现在。有些女性会在梦中认同公牛。许多女性在梦中会有你们所谓的男性反应。有些男性在梦中会有你们所谓的女性反应。公牛也可能代表做梦者认为固执的人。可能会形成斗牛梦。变化无穷无尽。某些通用意象因前世经历而具有强烈的个人意义。然而通用意象不仅影响梦境状态。这些意象是思想进化的最初基础。这几乎相当于细胞思维过程，但实际上是一种关联性的完形，细胞的理解曾经且正在通过整个生理机体传递。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There is also something you forget. You are your subconscious self, and oftentimes what makes no sense to the ego makes good sense to the overall personality. Still, there are psychological balances that always operate when the overall personality gestalt is operating effectively, as it is in both of your cases.
quotes.translation: 还有一点你们忘记了。你们就是你们的潜意识自我，常常对自我无意义的事，对整体人格却很有意义。尽管如此，当整体人格完形有效运作时——就像你们两人的情况那样——总有心理平衡在运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It is aware of itself as the smallest seed, both those that grow and those that do not grow. The personality of this gestalt is beyond comprehension at this point. It is both demanding and compassionate. The word, justice, is a human one, always implying punishment. And it has nothing to do with the God concept.
quotes.translation: 它知晓自身是最微小的种子，无论生长与否。这个完形的人格在此刻超乎理解。它既严苛又慈悲。"正义"这个词是人类用语，总暗含惩罚。它与神的概念毫无关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The inner self is always aware of the hidden mechanisms of these family gestalts. Those who have been closely bound through emotional ties often prefer to remain in closely tied or loosely tied physical relationships that continue through many lifetimes. New relationships are always encouraged however, for you can have ingrown reincarnational "families." Many of these form physical organizations that are actually manifestations of inner groupings.
quotes.translation: 内在自我始终觉察这些家庭完形的隐藏机制。那些通过情感纽带紧密相连的人，往往偏好维持紧密或松散的身体关系，这种关系会延续许多世。然而，新关系总是受到鼓励，因为你们可能形成内向生长的转世"家族"。许多这类家族形成物质组织，实际上是内在群体的显化。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: （In the 54th session Seth went into considerable detail in explaining the construction of entities. He could not give us this information earlier, he said, because we would have leaped to the conclusion that he was Ruburt's [Janes] subconscious mind; this is not so. As everything else does, entities constantly change. To quote Seth: "Ruburt is not myself now, in his present life; he is nevertheless an extension and materialization of the Seth that I was at one time... He grew, evolved and expanded in terms of a particular, personal set of value fulfillments... He is now an actual gestalt, a personality that was one of the probable personalities into which Seth could grow. I represent another, I am another. "
quotes.translation: （在第五十四节课中，赛斯详细解释了"存有"的构造。他说，他之所以不能更早告诉我们这些信息，是因为我们会贸然断定他是鲁柏（珍）的潜意识；事实并非如此。如同其他一切事物，存有也在不断变化。引用赛斯的话："鲁柏在今生并非现在的我；但他是我曾经是的那位赛斯的延伸与物质化……他在特定个人价值完成方面成长、进化并扩展……他现在是一个实际的完形，一个曾是我可能成长为的人格之一。我代表另一个，我是另一个。"）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Gradually psychological structures are able to focus upon vaster areas, and in order to achieve proficiency in this manner you do indeed begin to build up layered selves that have been independent identities. These varying perceptive abilities organize so that their perceptive powers are pooled in a gestalt that eventually forms a new identity, a more complicated psychological structure that is capable of perceiving larger areas of reality.
quotes.translation: 逐渐地，心理结构能够聚焦于更广阔的领域。为了以这种方式获得精通，你们确实开始构建曾是独立身份的分层自我。这些不同的感知能力进行组织，使它们的感知力汇聚成一个完形，最终形成一个新的身份——一个更复杂的心理结构，能够感知更广阔的现实领域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: These units combine into various kinds of gestalts of consciousness. Basically, it is not correct to say that one is more progressed than another. The petal of a flower, for example, is not more developed than the root. An ant on the ground may see that the petal is way above the root and stem, but ants are too wise to think that the petal must be better than the root.
quotes.translation: 这些单元组合成各种意识完形。从根本上说，说一个比另一个更进步是不正确的。例如，花瓣并不比根更发达。地上的蚂蚁可能看到花瓣远高于根和茎，但蚂蚁足够明智，不会认为花瓣必然优于根。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 683
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: As we have to some extent mentioned earlier, here we have travel through probable actions, where each conceivable action is experienced. The self allows itself to change while retaining knowledge that it is the self who changes. It develops through the changes. Time can only be measured through experience. It is obvious that other gestalt personalities experience more in an equivalent amount of your time, but this is not the point.
quotes.translation: 正如我们之前部分提及的，这里我们穿越可能行动，其中每个可想象的行动都被体验。自我允许自己改变，同时保持知道是自我在改变的知识。它通过改变而发展。时间只能通过体验来衡量。显然，其他完形人格在你们同等时间量中体验更多，但这不是重点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: (Smile, eyes open.) Short range predictions would be most difficult for me, since I cannot break down time as you think of it to that degree. I perceive instead at one glance seemingly whole segments of your time field. (Pause.) Seth as you knew him perceives your own system more clearly. (Pause.) From my viewpoint (pause) I do not perceive your physical universe then as you do. I do perceive your psychic values and Emotional intensities, and realize that you perceive but very small segments of these. As you break down the spacious present into moments, which you then experience, so also you break down psychic identity, gestalts, into small self structures.
quotes.translation: （微笑，睁眼。）短期预测对我而言最为困难，因为我无法像你们所想的那样将时间分解到那种程度。相反，我一眼就能感知你们时间场中看似完整的片段。（停顿。）你们所知的赛斯更清晰地感知你们的系统。（停顿。）从我的视角（停顿）我不像你们那样感知你们的物质宇宙。我确实感知你们的心理价值与情感强度，并意识到你们只感知到这些的极小片段。正如你们将广阔当下分解为瞬间来体验，你们也将心理身份、完形分解为小的自我结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now, this constant creation of the physical universe is not maintained through some localized subconscious that exists somewhere between two ears, behind the forehead. The individual subconscious, as I have explained, is the result of a psychic pooling of resources and abilities. It is a gestalt, maintained and formed by the cooperating, generalized consciousness of each atom and molecule of which the physical body is composed.
quotes.translation: 这种物质宇宙的持续创造并非通过存在于两耳之间、前额后方的某个局部潜意识来维持。如我所解释的，个体潜意识是心灵资源与能力汇聚的结果。它是一个完形，由构成物质身体的每个原子和分子所协作的普遍意识维持并形成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: We will maintain some sort of sensible consecutive nature here in the material, though the separation is of course arbitrary. Give us a moment. (Pause.) We will also be developing the God concept in terms of my choosing (amused), the pyramid consciousness gestalts of which I have spoken in the past. This will be given along with and as a part of the basic characteristics of reality, as divorced from camouflage materializations.
quotes.translation: 我们将在材料中保持某种合理的连贯性，尽管这种划分当然是任意的。请稍等片刻。（停顿。）我们还将以我选择的方式（带着笑意）发展上帝概念，即我过去提及的金字塔意识完形。这些将作为现实基本特征的一部分呈现，与伪装物质化相分离。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Many of the old ideas of precivilization come closer to anything near the truth. What you prefer to think of as God is basically and above all, indeed as I have said, an infinite energy gestalt: or pyramid consciousness. It is aware of itself as being, for example, you, Joseph. It is aware of itself as what seems to you as your own future and past selves.
quotes.translation: 许多前文明时代的古老观念更接近真相。你们倾向于称之为上帝的存在，本质上且首要地——正如我所说——是一个无限能量完形：或金字塔意识。它意识到自身即是存在，例如你，约瑟夫。它意识到自身在你们看来如同你们自己的未来与过去自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Since suggestion is used constantly, and by every cell in your body, then it is not a question of whether or not you can use suggestion, but of how to use it more effectively. And this will involve a balanced personality, for in such a personality action will be allowed freedom of expression. The ego will gain and not lose in the process, but we will not have an autocratic and willful ego, but a reasonable and even disciplined ego that is aware of its position, aware of its own dependency, as well as of its own peculiar and unique perceptive apartness. For the apartness is dependent upon its being a part of the whole gestalt.
quotes.translation: 由于暗示被持续使用，且被你身体的每个细胞使用，因此问题不在于你是否能使用暗示，而在于如何更有效地使用它。这将涉及平衡的人格，因为在这种人格中，行动将被允许自由表达。自我在此过程中将获得而非失去，但我们不会拥有专横任性的自我，而是理性甚至自律的自我——它知晓自身位置，知晓自身依赖性，也知晓自身独特而与众不同的感知独立性。因为这种独立性恰恰依赖于它是整体完形的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now, the ego, the dominant ego, does indeed affect the inner identity, and changes it even as it affects and changes the dominant ego. For we are dealing here after all with an interdependent gestalt. The interworking's of the whole gestalt have never been completely understood.
quotes.translation: 现在，主导自我的确会影响内在身份，并改变它，正如它影响并改变主导自我。毕竟我们在此处理的是相互依存的完形。整个完形的内在运作从未被完全理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: On the part of any human personality, therefore, it is extremely important that methods be learned to let action follow its normal directive bent within the personality, therefore avoiding these abortive offshoots that impede main directives and purposes of the unit as a whole. The integration of the whole personality as a psychological unit, and as an effective psychic gestalt, is obviously dependent upon the free and unimpeded flow of action. Any impediments here can be most threatening to the integrity of the personality itself, for one aspect of the personality would benefit at the expense of other aspects.
quotes.translation: 因此，对任何人类人格而言，学习让行动在人格内遵循其正常导向至关重要，从而避免这些阻碍整体单元主要导向与目的的畸形分支。将整个人格整合为心理单元及有效的灵性完形，显然依赖于行动的自由无阻流动。此处的任何阻碍都可能对人格本身的完整性构成最大威胁，因为人格的某个方面会以牺牲其他方面为代价而获益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: Identity always becomes part of that which it perceives, however, and so it constantly forms new gestalts, while accepting as itself a larger variety of experiences. Therefore identity grows, and as I have told you there are no limitations to it. Therefore we are forming new identities, and you have already accepted as part of yourself experiences which previously would have been considered alien, and not accepted.
quotes.translation: 然而，身份认同总是成为它所感知对象的一部分，因此它不断形成新的完形，同时将更广泛的体验接纳为自身。因此身份认同得以成长，正如我告诉过你的，它没有限制。所以我们正在形成新的身份认同，而你已经将那些先前会被视为异己、不被接纳的体验，接纳为自身的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: This psychological gestalt is a connector. I am dependent in a large measure upon Ruburts own knowledge, and lack of it, in that I cannot force for example from him, from his speech mechanism, concepts with which he is entirely unfamiliar. I must introduce them step by step.
quotes.translation: 这种心理完形是一个连接器。我在很大程度上依赖于鲁柏自身的知识及其匮乏程度，因为我无法强迫从他那里——例如从他的语言机制中——提取他完全不熟悉的概念。我必须逐步引入这些概念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Nevertheless, the atoms and molecules within the nail do possess their own kind of consciousness. The atoms and molecules that make up the pages of this book are also, within their own level, aware. Nothing exists -- neither rock, mineral, plant, animal, or air -- that is not filled with consciousness of its own kind. So you stand amid a constant vital commotion, a gestalt of aware energy, and you are yourselves physically composed of conscious cells that carry within themselves the realization of their own identity, that cooperate willingly to form the corporeal structure that is your physical body.
quotes.translation: 然而，指甲内的原子和分子确实拥有它们自己的意识。构成这本书书页的原子和分子，在其自身层面上也是有觉知的。没有任何存在——无论是岩石、矿物、植物、动物还是空气——是不充满其自身意识的。因此，你置身于持续不断的生机勃勃的骚动之中，一个觉知能量的完形，而你们自身在物质上是由有意识的细胞组成的，这些细胞内带着对自身身份认同的了悟，它们自愿合作，形成作为你物质身体的那个肉体结构。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: We have discussed this subject to some degree. However we have not begun a study in depth. It is now time for us to do so. The personality as you know is composed of energy gestalts. The dreams created by the personality can be considered therefore as a part of the changing personality. We are speaking here in one context only, for we know that the dream universe is also to some extent independent of personality.
quotes.translation: 我们已经在某种程度上讨论过这个主题。然而我们尚未开始深入研究。现在是我们这样做的时候了。人格，如你所知，是由能量完形组成的。因此，人格所创造的梦境可以被视为变化中人格的一部分。我们这里只在一个语境中讨论，因为我们知道梦境宇宙在某种程度上也独立于人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: These sessions represent quite an accomplishment on both of your parts, and you do use your inner senses to some important degree. Otherwise the material would not come through with any dependability. We have here what amounts to a gestalt of a kind. It is natural that your energies rise and ebb, and this is to be expected. To some degree I am able to reinforce your energies, and I do as you may have suspected.
quotes.translation: 这些课代表了你们双方相当了不起的成就，而且你们确实在相当重要的程度上运用了内在感官。否则这些资料就不会可靠地传递过来。我们这里拥有某种完形。你们的能量有起有落是很自然的，这也是意料之中的。在某种程度上，我能够增强你们的能量，而且正如你们可能已经猜到的，我确实这样做了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In this field, electrical force is the main method by which inner energy expresses itself. This is rather difficult to explain, and yet later it will not seem so. Personality gestalts within this field are built up electrically, with electric components, without physical matter. In this field possibilities and actualities are electrically computed. Your own personalities in some manners exist within this field.
quotes.translation: 在这个场域中，电力是内在能量表达自身的主要方式。这相当难以解释，但以后就不会显得如此了。这个场域内的人格完形是通过电力、利用电性成分构建起来的，没有物质实体。在这个场域中，可能性和现实性是通过电力计算出来的。你们自己的人格在某种程度上存在于这个场域之内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Some who wanted to travel from the Old World to the New, may be reborn in the new one. You must remember also that abilities from past lives are at your disposal for your present use. You reap your own rewards. Information concerning these is often given to you in the sleep state, and there is a kind of gestalt type of dream, a root dream, by which those who have known each other in past lives now communicate.
quotes.translation: 有些想从旧世界前往新世界的人，可能会在新世界中重生。你也必须记住，过去世的能力可供你今生使用。你收获自己的回报。关于这些的信息常在睡眠状态中给予你，有一种完形类型的梦，一种根源梦，过去世相识的人借此在当下沟通。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As the physical atoms and molecules combine to form cells, and the cells to form physical organs, and as they do not lose their individuality in so doing, and as the atoms and molecules themselves actually gain and share in higher perceptions because of this gestalt, so do the basic components or fragments of an entity constantly form new and varied personalities; and these in turn form entities of their own.
quotes.translation: 正如物理原子和分子结合形成细胞，细胞形成身体器官，且在此过程中它们并未失去个体性，原子和分子本身实际上因这种完形而获得并共享更高层次的感知，一个实体的基本组成部分或片段也不断形成新的、多样的人格；而这些人格又形成它们自己的实体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The changes will not suddenly show themselves. This is merely a slow beginning, but the initial steps have been made, and the first and initial program has been completed. It is developing even better than I had hoped, and our own material will now begin to really develop, for we have enough background to enable us to cover subject matter that would have been impossible at an earlier time. But the first portion of our program has been completed in many other ways, having to do with the development of abilities, and with the development of that gestalt which we now form.
quotes.translation: 变化不会突然显现。这只是一个缓慢的开始，但最初的步骤已经迈出，第一个初始计划已经完成。它的发展甚至比我希望的还要好，我们自己的资料现在将开始真正发展，因为我们有足够的背景来涵盖在更早时候不可能讨论的主题。但我们的计划的第一部分已在许多其他方面完成，涉及能力的发展，以及我们现在形成的那个完形的发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Each self, as a part of All That Is, therefore also retains memory of that state. It is for this reason that each portion of All That Is, each most minute consciousness, is endowed with the impetus toward survival, change, development and creativity. It is not enough that All That Is, as a primary consciousness- gestalt, desires further being, but, that every portion of it also carry this determination.
quotes.translation: 每个自己，作为一切万有的一部分，因此也保留了对那种状态的记忆。正因如此，一切万有的每一部分，每一个最微小的意识，都被赋予了朝向生存、变化、发展和创造的动力。不仅一切万有作为主要意识完形渴望进一步的存在，而且它的每一部分也都承载着这种决心。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The ego attempts to break down action into smaller and smaller units. The intuitions try to perceive action as a whole. The ego breaks down for purposes of examination, the intuitions construct. Both the ego and the intuitions, in performing their functions, obviously create action. The self may of course be considered as a gestalt of action, perceived in a different manner by various levels of itself.
quotes.translation: 自我试图将行动分解成越来越小的单位。直觉则试图将行动视为一个整体。自我为了检查而分解，直觉则构建。自我和直觉在履行其功能时，显然都创造了行动。自己当然可以被视为行动的完形，由其自身的不同层次以不同方式感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The constant interchange that exists biologically means that the same physical stuff that composes a man or a woman may be dispersed, and later form a toad, a starfish, a dog or a flower. It may be distributed into numberless different forms. That arithmetic11 of consciousness is not annihilated. It is multiplied and not divided. Reminiscent within each form is the consciousness of all the other combinations, all of the other alliances, as identity continually forms new creative endeavors and gestalts of relatedness. There is no discrimination, no prejudice.
quotes.translation: 生物学上存在的持续交换意味着，构成男人或女人的相同物理物质可能会被分散，后来形成一只蟾蜍、一只海星、一条狗或一朵花。它可能被分配到无数不同的形式中。意识的算术不会被消灭。它被倍增而非分割。在每个形式中，都让人联想到所有其他组合、所有其他联盟的意识，因为身份不断形成新的创造性努力和相关性的完形。没有歧视，没有偏见。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 725
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: It then does not reincarnate again upon that plane. However because of its own extraordinary nature, it itself forms with the inner self in an added gestalt, adding to the energy and ability of the inner self; and in a manner which I cannot yet explain to you, it voluntarily may give up its ego identification to a large degree for the purpose of giving its full energies to the store of the inner self.
quotes.translation: 它随后不再于该层面转世。然而因其非凡本性，它自身与内在自体形成一种附加完形，为内在自体的能量与能力增添力量；并以一种我尚无法向你解释的方式，它可能自愿在很大程度上放弃其自我认同，以便将其全部能量贡献给内在自体的储备。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Man is a part of that trans-species consciousness also, as are the plants and animals. Also, part of man's reality contributes to that trans-species organization, but he has not chosen to focus his practical daily consciousness in that direction, or to identify his individuality with it. As a result he does not understand the greater natural mobility he himself possesses, nor can he practically perceive the natural psychological gestalts of which he is a part, that form all of your natural -- meaning physical -- world.
quotes.translation: 人类也是那种跨物种意识的一部分，植物和动物亦然。同时，人类实相的某些部分也贡献给那种跨物种组织，但他并未选择将日常实用意识聚焦于那个方向，也未将自身个体性与之认同。因此他既不了解自身所拥有的更大自然流动性，也无法实际感知构成你们所有自然（即物质）世界的那些自然心理完形——他正是其中一部分。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This electrical reality will be a basis for many future discussions, and you will see the basis behind my contention that dream locations indeed exist in actuality. It is important also to realize that psychic gestalts are built up electrically, and that many positive attractions exist between and within various electrical fields, so that there is constant motion and travel between them.
quotes.translation: 这种电性实相将成为未来许多讨论的基础，你们将看到我主张背后的依据：梦境地点确实真实存在。同样重要的是要认识到，心理完形是通过电性构建的，各种电场之间及内部存在着许多正向吸引，因此它们之间持续发生着运动与穿梭。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This cooperative nature of the libido has been completely overlooked and misinterpreted for various reasons, many simply due to ignorance. You know that the individual cells of any form cooperate to form another, more complicated gestalt; and without the cooperation not only would the more complicated structure cease to operate, but the individual cells would also cease to operate.
quotes.translation: 力比多的这种合作性质完全被忽视且被曲解，原因多种多样，许多纯粹出于无知。你们知道任何形态的个体细胞都会合作形成另一种更复杂的完形；若缺乏这种合作，不仅更复杂的结构会停止运作，个体细胞本身也将停止运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There are other self-conscious portions of the self however, with which the ego is not at all familiar, but of which the subconscious has intuitive knowledge. These self-conscious portions of the self exist in different reality systems. Before we go into our Dr. Instream material, let me remind you however that there is a whole self, composed of these various self-conscious selves, and that a portion of the self is indeed aware of the unity that exists to form the whole psychological gestalt.
quotes.translation: 然而自体还存在其他自我意识部分，自我对此完全不熟悉，但潜意识对其有直觉认知。这些自体的自我意识部分存在于不同的实相系统中。在我们进入英斯准博士资料之前，请允许我提醒你们：存在一个由这些不同自我意识自体组成的整体自体，而自体的某个部分确实觉察到构成整体心理完形的那份统一性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: At the same time, because of the methods we use, some translation is often necessary. In many cases this translation is done by the intervening psychological framework, which is simply the psychological point closest to the meeting of Ruburts personality and my own, for he does not fade out as a personality. He extends himself in an expansion. The psychological expansion on his end, and the psychological expansion on my end, form the gestalt, the psychological bridge, of which I have spoken.
quotes.translation: 同时，由于我们使用的方法，常常需要进行某种翻译。在许多情况下，这种翻译由介入的心理架构完成——这架构正是最接近鲁柏人格与我人格交汇点的心理节点，因为他并未作为人格消失。他通过扩展延伸自身。他那一端的心理扩展与我这一端的心理扩展，共同构成了我曾提及的完形——那座心理桥梁。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: This personality will refer to the historical Christ, will recognize his relationship with that personality; but within him the three personality groupings will form a new psychic entity, a different psychological gestalt. As this metamorphosis takes place, it will initiate a metamorphosis on a human level also (emphatically), as man's inner abilities are accepted and developed.
quotes.translation: 这个人格将指涉历史上的基督，会认出自己与那个人格的关系；但在他之内，三个人格群体会形成一个新的心灵实体，一个不同的心理完形。当这种蜕变发生时，它也会在人类层面引发蜕变（强调地），因为人类的内在能力被接纳和发展。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is a self materialized in physical form. It is conscious of itself as belonging to action. The fact that it may be part of a larger gestalt self in no way belittles its own identity. It is conscious of the gestalts of which it is part.
quotes.translation: 它是一个在物质形态中具体化的自己。它意识到自己属于行动。它可能是更大完形自己的一部分，这一事实丝毫不贬低它自身的身份。它意识到它所属的那些完形。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The organizing ability grows and potentials become more actual as such particles combine. However all potentialities are latent in each and every unit, regardless of size, and no combinations or coming-together are accidental, but are governed by inner principles of organization. All combinations of particles are voluntary, and based upon principles of value fulfillment, which operates within and causes those acts or motions which are conducive to the formation of more complicated gestalts.
quotes.translation: 随着这类粒子的结合，组织能力增长，潜能变得更实际。然而所有潜能都潜在于每一个单元中，不论大小，没有结合或聚合是偶然的，而是受内在组织原则支配。所有粒子的结合都是自愿的，并基于价值完成的原则，该原则在内部运作，并引发那些有助于形成更复杂完形的行动或运动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Q-u-a-n-d-r-a-n-t-s, will not concern you for quite some time. Needless to say I wanted you to know that there is much more than even this, complexities that are truly astounding, intelligences that operate in what I suppose you would call a gestalt fashion, building blocks of vitalities of truly unbelievable maturity, awareness and comprehension. These are the near ultimate.
quotes.translation: Q-u-a-n-d-r-a-n-t-s，在相当长一段时间内不会与你们有关。不用说，我想让你们知道，甚至还有比这多得多的东西，真正令人惊叹的复杂性，以我猜你们会称之为完形方式运作的智能，具有真正难以置信的成熟度、觉知和理解力的生命力积木。这些是近乎终极的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The personality itself, as you know, is a gestalt of action, and as such it is necessary that the flow of action within it follow the overall directives of the entity and the inner self. When for example the ego is allowed to apply too tightly and too rigorously its inhibitory functions, then this freedom of action within the personality is seriously divided and impeded.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，人格本身就是一个行动的完形，因此，其中的行动之流必须遵循存有和内我的总体指令。例如，当自我被允许过于严格和严苛地运用其抑制功能时，人格内的这种行动自由就会严重分裂和受阻。

quotes.text: Now, as in the physical field atoms combine for their own benefit and individually into more complicated structure gestalts, so do they also combine to form such gestalts, though of a somewhat different nature, in the dream world.
quotes.translation: 现在，如同在物质领域中原子为了自身利益而个体性地结合成更复杂的结构完形，在梦境世界中，它们也以略有不同的性质结合形成这样的完形。
