quotes.text: He literally could not operate until he assimilated these new experiences or denied them, in the main. Your encouragement was essential, and your support and encouragement is now. You are separate individuals and quite separate personalities, and you will continue to exist as separate identities. Nevertheless you are also part of other identities. And you two, you two form a gestalt, so that working together you have more knowledge, ability and information than you have separately.
quotes.translation: 他基本上无法运作，直到他同化这些新经验或否定它们。你的鼓励至关重要，现在你的支持和鼓励依然如此。你们是独立的个体，也是相当独立的人格，并将继续作为独立的身份存在。然而，你们也是其他身份的一部分。你们两人，你们两人形成了一个完形，因此合作时你们拥有的知识、能力和信息比单独时更多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: I have mentioned, for example, what you may think of as infinite building blocks or pyramids of comprehension, and these could not operate within your physical universe, as the basic gestalt freedom is severely limited. This is also one of the reasons why whole entities, as whole entities, do not exist in your field, but only separate, partially disconnected portions.
quotes.translation: 例如，我曾提到你们可能视为无限积木或理解金字塔的东西，它们无法在你们的物质宇宙中运作，因为基本的完形自由受到严重限制。这也是为什么整体存有作为整体存有并不存在于你们的领域，而只以分离、部分不连贯的部分存在的原因之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is in your nature to use much of your energy in artistic creation. You must then turn it outward in this manner. From the wealth of inner data your nature demands that you form new gestalts, and in painting them you automatically relate them outward. You need the inner data and the journeys inward, but these must always be of a disciplined nature, and not overdone.
quotes.translation: 将大量能量用于艺术创作是你们的天性。你们必须以这种方式将其向外展现。从内在数据的丰富性中，你们的天性要求你们形成新的完形，并在绘画中自动将它们向外关联。你们需要内在数据和向内探索，但这些必须始终具有纪律性，且不可过度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Actions have an electrical reality. Your outer senses do not perceive electrical realities of this nature. Nevertheless, you are a gestalt of electrical actions. Within the physical matter of your chromosomes there are electrically coded systems. These are not the chromosomes themselves. The chromosomes are the physical materialization of the inner electrical data.
quotes.translation: 行动具有电性实相。你们的外在感官无法感知这种性质的电性实相。然而，你们是电性行动的完形。在你们染色体的物质内部，存在着电性编码系统。这些并非染色体本身。染色体是内在电性数据的物质显化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Personality is a gestalt of ever-changing perception. It is the part of the identity which perceives. I do not force my perceptions upon the woman through whom I speak, nor is her consciousness blotted out during our communications. Instead there is an expansion of her consciousness and a projection of energy that is directed away from three-dimensional reality.
quotes.translation: 人格是不断变化的感知的完形。它是身份中感知的部分。我不将我的感知强加于借之说话的女士，在我们的交流中她的意识也未被抹去。相反，她的意识得到扩展，能量投射远离三维实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: That inner psychological universe is a psychic gestalt, propelled, formed, sustained or driven by value fulfillment, love and desire, by the loving values that have no limit (intently). The universe does not give up on itself, or on any of its creatures. It is ruled by a different set of principles, a different set of values, and by inner cooperative exuberance.
quotes.translation: 那个内在心理宇宙是一个心灵完形，由价值完成、爱与渴望、由无限慈爱的价值所推动、形成、维持或驱动（专注地）。宇宙不会放弃自身，也不会放弃它的任何造物。它由一套不同的原则、一套不同的价值观以及内在合作的丰盛所统治。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now we may possibly develop into a newer gestalt, for I cannot see all portions--underline all portions--of the spacious present. There are still veils before my eyes. This is a part of the present I do not perceive. If so, it will be one in which identities are completely retained, and there is no question of a dominancy, but of a smooth-working organization.
quotes.translation: 现在我们可能发展成一种更新的完形，因为我无法看见广袤当下的所有部分——强调所有部分。我的眼前仍有面纱。这是我未能感知到的当下的一部分。若是如此，那将是一个身份完全保留的完形，其中不存在支配权的问题，而是一种顺畅运作的组织。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: I am what I have always said that I was, and I said it in as Emotionally neutral terms as possible: --an energy essence personality. It is he who adds any other coloration here, and then reacts to those. I have reincarnated, as the material mentions, and so have you both. I have tried to explain personality gestalts and the connections that exist between us.
quotes.translation: 我始终是我一直所说的那个存在，并且我尽可能以情感中立的措辞来说明：一个能量本质人格。是他在此处添加任何其他色彩，然后对这些色彩做出反应。如资料所述，我曾转世过，你们两位也是如此。我曾试图解释人格完形以及我们之间存在的联系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The personality structure does not make sense unless such past experience is taken into consideration. Potentials do not simply appear, they evolve. I have told you that the most minute portion of energy possesses consciousness and has its own identity. This identity of itself is never annihilated. It may form into new gestalts but the identity is retained.
quotes.translation: 除非将这种过往经验纳入考量，否则人格结构便毫无意义。潜能并非凭空出现，而是逐渐演化。我曾告诉过你们，最微小的能量单位也拥有意识并保有其自身身份。这个身份本身永远不会被消灭。它可能形成新的完形，但身份仍被保留。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Like the mountain, therefore, you have a history in terms of the present that is yours, and yet not yours. It does not control you, for you alter it with each thought and action, even as each motion at the mountain's top affects its base. The layers at the bottom, however, are also constantly changing, so that the whole area is a gestalt of relatedness.
quotes.translation: 因此，如同山脉一般，你们拥有一个属于当下却又不完全属于你们的历史。它并不控制你们，因为你们用每个念头和行动改变它，正如山顶的每个动作都会影响山脚。然而，底部的岩层也在不断变化，使得整个区域成为一张关联性的完形。

quotes.text: The combined molecular consciousnesses, retaining identity, form a gestalt consciousness that is the ego, the outer ego, that is in turn utilized by the consciousness of the inner ego. The inner ego being unhampered by the laws of your plane, once having entered your plane at physical birth, can therefore leave the physical body and then reconstruct it.
quotes.translation: 分子意识的集合体在保留身份的情况下，形成一个完形意识，即自我、外在自我，而外在自我又被内在自我的意识所运用。内在自我不受你们层面法则的束缚，一旦在肉体出生时进入你们的层面，便能离开肉体并重新构建它。

quotes.text: This density is extremely important, for it is a density of intensities. And it is the infinite variety and gradations of intensity that makes all identities possible, and all gestalts, all identities in terms of personalities and fields and universes. It is this density, this infinite variety of intensity, which allows for both identity and of change.
quotes.translation: 这种密度极为重要，因为它是强度的密度。正是这种无限多样的强度层级，使得所有身份、所有完形、所有以人格、场域和宇宙形式存在的身份成为可能。正是这种密度、这种强度的无限多样性，同时允许了身份的存在与变化。

quotes.text: "That identity of Billy's remains vital, known to itself whether or not it is reactivated in your terms. This is not necessarily always the case -- and there is great variation -- but Billy identified with 'the larger organization' of the litter [that is, with his brothers and sisters, all of whom are also dead], and the consciousnesses of that litter are now together. They are forming a gestalt, where the five consciousnesses will merge to form a new identity."
quotes.translation: 比利的身份仍然保持活力，无论是否以你们的时间术语重新激活，它自身都知晓其存在。这并非总是如此——存在很大差异——但比利认同了那窝幼崽的"更大组织"（即他的兄弟姐妹们，他们也都已去世），那窝幼崽的意识如今已聚集在一起。他们正在形成一个完形，五个意识将融合成一个新的身份。

quotes.text: I have mentioned that the individual cells and molecules, atoms and other basic structures, definitely gain in their formation into the gestalt of a more complicated structure, being able to participate in experiences and value fulfillments that would otherwise not be possible for them in their own simpler isolated form. This is of prime importance.
quotes.translation: 我曾提到，个体细胞与分子、原子及其他基本结构，在融入更复杂结构的完形时，确实能获得增益，得以参与那些以自身简单孤立形态无法实现的体验与价值完成。这一点至关重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This self-awareness in each atom and molecule determines what sort of cell or combination that the particular atom or molecule will form. The cells then, being a gestalt, contain the individual conscious components, which then form a consciousness greater than the consciousness of any individual component within, and different in scope and ability.
quotes.translation: 每个原子和分子中的这种自我意识，决定了该原子或分子将形成何种细胞或组合。细胞作为完形，包含了个体意识组件，这些组件进而形成一种意识，其层次超越内部任何个体组件的意识，且在范围与能力上截然不同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There will be a joyous gathering together of his identity when the body dies. These are like the weaving together of mosaics, the weavings of the personality in and out, and no effect is meaningless nor without benefit. In this life you were meant to create, and teach. All creation is teaching. Your entity is older than your father's. You and Ruburt and I have been connected many times. The gestalt, the conditions, have in the past been beneficial for us all.
quotes.translation: 当身体死亡时，他的身份将迎来一场欢快的聚合。这如同马赛克拼图的交织，人格在其中穿梭往复，没有一种效应是无意义的，也没有一种是不具裨益的。此生你本应去创造与教导。一切创造皆是教导。你的存有比你父亲的更古老。你、鲁柏和我已多次相连。这个完形、这些条件，在过去对我们所有人都是有益的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: If however we changed our arbitrary boundary points, then the minor selves at either end would now seem to be portions of other selves. For practical purposes it may be said that a self is composed of a gestalt of perception patterns, within which a fairly constant efficiency is maintained. This is the best definition I can give you at this time.
quotes.translation: 然而，若我们改变任意设定的边界点，那么两端的小我便会看似成为其他自我的一部分。为实用起见，可以说一个自我是由感知模式的完形所构成，在此完形内维持着相当恒定的效能。这是我目前能给出的最佳定义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Since your physical time operates as it does, the physical organism does not have time within its own framework to experience any more than one probable event. It cannot focus upon two events at once. It goes without saying, again, that we are simplifying matters considerably, since each physical event is actually a gestalt of many small events.
quotes.translation: 既然你们的物理时间以这种方式运作，物理有机体在其自身框架内便没有时间去体验超过一个可能事件。它无法同时聚焦于两个事件。不言而喻，我们再次将问题大幅简化了，因为每个物理事件实际上都是许多小事件的完形。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Oftentimes members of various groups -- military groups, church groups, hunting groups, will in another life form family relationships in which they will then work out old problems in new ways. Families must be considered as gestalts of psychic activity; they have a subjective identity, of which no particular member of the group may be aware.
quotes.translation: 各种团体的成员——军事团体、教会团体、狩猎团体——往往会在另一世形成家庭关系，在其中以新的方式解决旧的问题。家庭必须被视为心灵活动的完形；它们具有主观的身份认同，而团体中的任何特定成员可能都未察觉这一点。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: All portions of All That Is do not recognize themselves consciously as All That Is. But know themselves mainly as individuals, not as the prime gestalt individual. When realization is reached at the highest level, then All That Is instantly creates new realities, and to some extent, you see, loses the conscious knowledge of its own identity.
quotes.translation: 一切万有的所有部分并不有意识地认知自己为一切万有。它们主要将自己认知为个体，而非原始的完形个体。当在最高层面达到领悟时，一切万有会立即创造新的实相，并在某种程度上失去对自身身份的有意识认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I do not make it a practice to observe. We are connected, however, in our psychological gestalt, and so I am aware of any intense feelings on your part, or strong reactions of any kind. This does not mean that I am necessarily aware of all events within your lives, or that I always break down the feelings I receive from you into specifics.
quotes.translation: 我并非习惯性地进行观察。然而，在我们的心理完形中我们彼此相连，因此我能感知到你任何强烈的情感或任何强烈的反应。这并不表示我必然知晓你生活中的所有事件，或总能将我从你处接收到的感受分解为具体细节。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You may not be aware of the conscious nature of each atom in your body, or of the gestalt consciousness formed by those atoms as they build into cells, but it is not necessary for them, or for their own awareness of themselves, that you give them that recognition. The consciousness in the cells exists whether or not you recognize it.
quotes.translation: 你可能未察觉体内每个原子的意识本质，或这些原子组合成细胞时形成的完形意识，但你的认知对它们或它们对自身的觉察而言并非必要。无论你是否承认，细胞中的意识始终存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: In other sessions I have explained precisely and in detailed fashion the steps by which this individualized vitality forms its own energy into molecules and atoms, which are the basis for further more advanced gestalts. For his refusal to pursue the examination of such forces, mankind suffers greatly the results of his own ignorance.
quotes.translation: 在其他课中，我已精确详尽地解释过这种个体化的活力如何将自身能量形成为分子和原子——这些是更高级完形的基础。由于人类拒绝探究这类力量，他们正深受自身无知带来的后果之苦。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This does not mean that the word indeed would have no meaning. Psychological frameworks and psychic gestalts form the basis for individual reality regardless of system. All of these do imply a whole, but the very term whole would again be meaningless if the whole, through self conscious individual parts, were not conscious of itself.
quotes.translation: 这并不意味着"话语"一词将毫无意义。无论系统如何，心理架构与心灵完形构成了个体实相的基础。所有这些确实暗示着整体，但若整体不能通过具有自我意识的个体部分觉察自身，那么"整体"一词本身也将失去意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The self will truly utilize the atoms and molecules; the consciousness will travel by this method. The particular physical body will then be known for what it is: a cooperative psychic gestalt, a psychio-physical structure formed together by the inner ego, utilizing atoms and molecules that are in themselves living and conscious.
quotes.translation: 自我将真正运用原子与分子；意识将以此方式旅行。届时特定的物质身体将被认知为它本来的面目：一个合作性的心灵完形，一个由内在自我共同形成的心理-物理结构，运用着本身具有生命和意识的原子与分子。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The psychic structure of consciousness that organizes that bodily gestalt is, however, not dependent upon it, and so the you that you experience is only a portion of this greater identity.
quotes.translation: 组织那个身体完形的意识心灵结构，却并不依赖它，因此你所体验的"你"只是这个更大本体的一部分。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The conscious mind is a maker of distinctions. It brings to the surface of awareness whole gestalts of previously unconscious material, then assembles and organizes it in ever-changing form. Through purposeful focus, a literally infinite amount of such data can be unconsciously sorted; then only the desired elements will emerge.
quotes.translation: 意识心是区别的制造者。它将先前无意识材料的完整完形带到意识表面，然后以不断变化的形式进行组装和组织。通过有目的的聚焦，可以无意识地筛选出几乎无限量的此类数据；随后只有所需的元素才会浮现。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This is at our simplest and most basic level. The forms then build, one within or upon the other, in the manner in which I explained that the gestalt of a human body was maintained. In many ways like does attract like; certain patterns therefore being set up, are used by other energy bits of similar capacity and strength.
quotes.translation: 这是在我们最简单、最基础的层面上。随后形态一个接一个地构建，一个在另一个之内或之上，正如我解释过人体完形得以维持的方式。在许多方面，同类相吸；因此某些模式被建立后，会被其他具有相似能力和强度的能量片段所使用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I know this much and no more. He is not human. He is not "he," if you are thinking in terms of sex. Nor is he "she." Such separations and designations are merely arbitrary in your field. He is individual in the term that many energies are focused into one; and indeed there is one infinite personality, but it is a gestalt.
quotes.translation: 我所知的仅此而已。他不是人类。如果你以性别概念思考，他不是"他"，也不是"她"。这些区分和命名在你们的领域只是武断的。他是"个体"——在这个词的意义上，许多能量聚焦于一体；确实存在一个无限的人格，但它是一个完形。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: In a strange manner she holds the family together, simply because they unite so strongly against her. Without this they would be less united. A rather delicate psychological gestalt operates with the family as a whole. The father actually is not the uniting principle here, but the feeling against the mother, at this time.
quotes.translation: 以一种奇特的方式，她维系着这个家庭，仅仅因为家人们如此强烈地联合起来反对她。没有她，他们就不会如此团结。一个相当微妙的心理完形运作于整个家庭之中。父亲实际上并非这里的凝聚原则，而是此刻对母亲的共同反感。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Value fulfillment opens the many eyes of the self to its various portions. It enables the self to expand, to join in a gestalt with other selves. It is only your ego which leads you to believe that such an expansion would result in a lessening of consciousness on the one hand, or an invasion of other selves on the other.
quotes.translation: 价值完成开启了自我的众多眼睛，使其得以看见自身的各个部分。它让自我能够扩展，与其他自我形成完形。唯有你的自我才会让你相信，这种扩展一方面会导致意识的减弱，另一方面会侵犯其他自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Incidentally, in the same manner that psychological experience exists, and does not take up space, in this same manner do psychic gestalts of intelligence exist, more or less within your plane and yet not visible to your senses. They have some limited effect on your plane however, but this is part of another discussion.
quotes.translation: 顺便一提，正如心理经验存在且不占据空间一样，智能的灵性完形也以同样的方式存在，或多或少存在于你的层面之内，却不为你的感官所见。不过，它们对你的层面确实有一些有限的影响，但这属于另一讨论的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The idea that I want to portray is a difficult one, for as you know everything that is, is conscious. And everything that is, is also self-conscious, in degree according to its abilities; and everything that is therefore contains identity and separation, even while it is part of a large and complicated gestalt.
quotes.translation: 我想描绘的概念颇为困难，因为如你所知，一切存在之物皆有意识。而一切存在之物也皆有自我意识，其程度依其能力而定；因此，一切存在之物都包含身份认同与分离性，即便它同时是一个庞大而复杂的完形的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In the time framework within which you now exist I can help you, but you cannot help me except by allowing me to help you, you see. In the gestalt which could develop we would be in a position of helping each other more equally. Now through you I affect physical reality, and this is indeed one of my purposes.
quotes.translation: 在你目前存在的时间架构内，我可以帮助你，但你无法帮助我，除非你允许我帮助你，你明白吗？在可能发展的完形中，我们将处于更平等地互相帮助的位置。现在，通过你，我影响着物质实相，而这确实是我的目的之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: There is nothing, neither knowledge nor beauty nor truth, that exists independently of consciousness or personality. My personality is such that it is not intimate or understandable to you, now, simply because it is a personality based upon different root assumptions than your own, and has its prime existence in dimensions that are composed of personality structures and gestalts based on alien psychological activities.
quotes.translation: 没有任何事物——无论是知识、美还是真理——能够独立于意识或人格而存在。我的人格目前对你而言既不亲密也不可理解，仅仅是因为它基于与你不同的根本假设，并且其主要存在于由人格结构与完形所构成的维度中，而这些完形基于陌生的心理活动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: As you know, inner data must be perceived through the inner senses. In formulating a theory concerning the primary energy gestalt, the data is distorted by the peculiar set of outer sensory equipment characteristic of any given plane of reality. This is known, that man forms his god in his own image.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，内在资料必须通过内在感官来感知。在构建关于原初能量完形的理论时，资料会被任何特定实相层面所特有的外在感官设备所扭曲。这是众所周知的：人按照自己的形象塑造他的神。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You as artist, symbolically speaking, should not step backward to see the landscape more clearly, but step into it so that you can feel it more clearly. If you sensethe peculiar and overall gestalt that is beneath the form at any given time, then creation of the form will follow naturally and truly.
quotes.translation: 你作为艺术家，象征性地来说，不应后退一步以求更清晰地看到风景，而应踏入其中，以便更真切地感受它。如果你在任何特定时刻感知到形式之下的独特而整体的完形，那么形式的创造便会自然而真实地随之而来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The inwardness is individualized. This is the rule. There is no unindividualized energy. There is no energy that is not to some extent aware of itself; having sought and achieved expression through physical form in one way or another, it is not satisfied but forever seeks more complicated gestalts.
quotes.translation: 内在性是个体化的。这是法则。没有非个体化的能量。没有一种能量在某种程度上不意识到自身；它通过物理形式以某种方式寻求并达成表达后，并不满足，而是永远寻求更复杂的完形。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Your father's greatest vitality was in the inventor's reality, and so in your terms this one suffered. This does not mean that each personality, regardless of probabilities, is not endowed with free will, and so forth. Each is born, in whatever system, from a source gestalt energy, and develops.
quotes.translation: 你父亲最大的活力存在于发明家的实相中，因此用你们的说法，这一部分受苦了。这并不意味着每个人格，无论概率如何，不被赋予自由意志等等。每个系统，无论何种，都源于一个源头完形能量，并发展。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 680
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: In certain basic and vital ways, your own consciousness is a portion of that divine gestalt. In the terms of your earthly experience, it is a metaphysical, a scientific, and a creative error to separate matter from consciousness, for consciousness materializes itself as matter in physical life.
quotes.translation: 在某些基本且至关重要的方面，你自己的意识是那神圣完形的一部分。以你们尘世经验的术语来说，将物质与意识分离，是形而上、科学和创造上的错误，因为意识在物质生命中将自己具体化为物质。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Consider the spectacular framework of your body just from the physical standpoint. You perceive it as solid, as you perceive all other physical matter; yet the more matter is explored the more obvious it becomes that within it energy takes on specific shape (in the form of organs, cells, molecules, atoms, electrons), each less physical than the last, each combining in mysterious gestalt to form matter.
quotes.translation: 仅从物理角度考虑你身体的壮观架构。你视它为固体，如同你视所有其他物理物质；然而，对物质探索得越多，就越明显的是，在其中能量采取特定形状（以器官、细胞、分子、原子、电子的形式），每一层都比上一层更非物质，每一层都以神秘的完形结合形成物质。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The next chapter will relate what experience I have had in all my existences, with those pyramid gestalts of which I speak in the material, and with my own and about my own relationship with the personality you call Seth Two, and with multidimensional consciousness far more evolved than I.
quotes.translation: 下一章将讲述我在所有存在中所获得的经验，涉及我在材料中提到的那些金字塔完形，以及我自身与你们称为赛斯二的人格的关系，还有与比我进化得多的多维意识的关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: While you have highly limited concepts about the nature of the self, you cannot begin to conceive of a multidimensional godhood, or a universal reality in which all consciousness is unique, inviolate -- and yet given to the formation of infinite gestalts of organization and meaning.
quotes.translation: 由于你对自我本质的概念极为有限，你无法开始构想一个多维度的神性，或一个所有意识都独特、不可侵犯——却又被赋予形成无限组织与意义完形的宇宙实相。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Every so often I've thought of averaging Jane's dictation time for Seth Speaks and Personal Reality in the same way, but haven't done so. I'm somewhat puzzled to note, however, that her very short working times for the Seth books seem to be either ignored or taken for granted by practically everyone -- or, perhaps, those factors just aren't understood in terms of ordinary linear time. Maybe I'm alone in my interest here, for even Jane doesn't express any great curiosity about the time she has invested in the Seth material; she just delivers it. But given her abilities, I think her speed of production is a close physical approach to, or translation of, Seth's idea that basically all exists at once -- that really there is no time, and that the Seth books, for example, are "there" to be had in final form for just the tuning in. (In Section 3 of this volume, Note 2 for Session 692 contains information on another way by which we can move closer to Seth's idea of simultaneity from our physical reality, but that method grows out of material not discussed here.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The material that I have given you on the nature of matter should make it clear that every atom and molecule has its own condensed, coded consciousness, and that no gestalt or formation of any kind can occur without the cooperation and comprehension of the consciousnesses involved.
quotes.translation: 我给予你们的关于物质本质的资料，应当清楚表明每个原子和分子都有其自身浓缩、编码的意识，而任何完形或任何形式的形成，若无相关意识的合作与理解，都不可能发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The next chapter will relate what experience I have had in all my existences with those "pyramid gestalts" of which I speak in the material, and about my own relationship with the personality you call Seth Two, and with multidimensional consciousnesses far more evolved than I.
quotes.translation: 下一章将讲述我在所有存在中，与我在资料中提及的那些"金字塔完形"的经历，以及我与你们称为赛斯二的人格，与比我进化得多的多维意识之间的关系。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Here is a copy of that outline, which was given to us in Session 510, January 19, 1970. As you'll see here, Seth calls me Ruburt, and Rob, Joseph. These names represent our entire personalities as distinguished from our present physically oriented selves.

quotes.text: The legend of Christ is of great psychic import however, and is intrinsically true. This does not mean it is based in historical fact. In many ways it is more true than historic fact, for man himself created that which had not been provided. The creation nevertheless happened in quite real terms, and is part of mankind's inner recognition of the pyramid gestalts of which I have spoken.
quotes.translation: 然而，基督的传说具有重大的心灵意义，并且本质上是真实的。这并不意味着它基于历史事实。在许多方面，它比历史事实更真实，因为人类自己创造了那本未提供的东西。然而，这种创造确实以相当真实的方式发生了，并且是人类对我在前面提到的金字塔完形的内在认知的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It is training for fifth-dimensional existence, and you will be working with an odd kind of time, to you. You will be forming new gestalts of experience, using past, present and future as a painter chooses his colors, combining them into various paintings.
quotes.translation: 这是为第五维度的存在所做的训练，你们将处理一种对你们而言奇特的时间。你们将形成新的经验完形，使用过去、现在和未来，如同画家选择他的色彩，将它们组合成各种画作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: An energy gestalt maintains its individuality as a portion of All That Is. These are not impersonal energy forms. They are very highly individualized psychological entities. Their psychological development however is far different than any that you know.
quotes.translation: 一个能量完形作为一切万有的一部分维持其个体性。这些并非非人格的能量形式。它们是高度个体化的心理实体。然而，它们的心理发展远不同于你们所知的任何形式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The primary energy gestalt did not have a beginning in time, nor will it end in time. It is a result of an expansion, again, in terms of value fulfillment, an expansion that has nothing to do with either time or space as men conceive them.
quotes.translation: 原初能量完形在时间中没有起点，也不会在时间中终结。它是价值完成式扩张的结果——这种扩张与人类所认知的时间或空间毫无关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Dictation: This inner universe (pause) is a gestalt formed by fields of awareized energy that contains what we will call "information" for now--but we will have some comments later, for this is not the kind of information you are used to.
quotes.translation: 口授：这个内在宇宙（停顿）是由觉知能量场构成的完形，其中包含我们暂且称为"资讯"的内容——但稍后我们会补充说明，因为这并非你们惯常理解的资讯类型。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: A primary construction is a psychic gestalt, formed into matter by a consciousness of itself. Such a primary construction is an attempt to create, in the world of matter, a replica of the inner psychic construction of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 原初建构是一种心灵完形，由自我意识塑造成物质形态。这种原初建构试图在物质世界中复制完整自我的内在心灵结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There is a constant, ever-enfolding and ever-expanding reality. The pyramids of psychic gestalts of which I have spoken represent in your terms all beginnings and all endings, which again expand into new beginnings and new forms.
quotes.translation: 存在一个持续不断、永远展开且永远扩展的实相。我曾提及的心灵完形金字塔，以你们的说法代表着所有起点与终点，而这些起点与终点又会再度扩展为新的开端与新的形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: We will also have more to say concerning the ways in which such a gestalt as this is composed. Again, I will let you take a break, for I am dealing relatively easily with you this evening, and then we will again continue.
quotes.translation: 关于此类完形的构成方式，我们还将进一步探讨。今晚我相对轻松地与你交流，现在先让你休息片刻，稍后我们再继续。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The Seth personality has been an intermediary, and a legitimate one. (Pause.) The information already given to you regarding the nature of personality gestalts should make this development seem indeed a fitting one.
quotes.translation: 赛斯人格一直扮演着中介角色，且是正当的中介。（停顿。）关于人格完形本质的资讯既已提供，应当能使这个发展显得恰如其分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: There is no time boundary as you know it. This is obviously a gestalt. The experiences however of individual two, for example, are constantly being changed because of the intervention of the other personalities.
quotes.translation: 没有你们所知的时间界限。这显然是一个完形。然而，例如个体二的经验，会因其他人格的介入而不断改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Each physical glass is constructed of quite real molecules and atoms, which have their own generalized consciousness and capsule comprehension, and which form together in the gestalt called a glass.
quotes.translation: 每一个物理玻璃杯都由非常真实的分子和原子构成，它们拥有自己的普遍意识和胶囊式理解，并共同形成一个被称为玻璃杯的完形。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: These units--let us discuss them as they are related, for example, to a rock. The rock is composed of atoms and molecules each with their own consciousness. This forms a gestalt-rock-consciousness.
quotes.translation: 这些单位——让我们以它们与岩石的关系为例来讨论。岩石由原子和分子组成，每个原子和分子都有自己的意识。这形成了一个岩石-意识-完形。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There will be a group gestalt operating that should result in very definite benefits to them and to Ruburt. It is no coincidence that he waited this long to introduce the material for class study.
quotes.translation: 将有一个群体完形在运作，应该会给他们和鲁柏带来非常明确的好处。他等了这么久才引入课堂学习的材料，这并非巧合。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It is true that the pyramid gestalts of which I have spoken can be said to merge into what you may refer to as a unitary and even sublime being, but this is grossly simplified.
quotes.translation: 诚然，我曾提到的金字塔完形可以说融合成你们可能称之为统一甚至崇高的存在，但这只是极度简化的说法。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: For as many layers of the self compose the whole self, so many selves form a gestalt of which you know relatively little, and of which I am not yet prepared to tell you.
quotes.translation: 因为正如多重自我层构成整体自我，同样多的自我形成一个完形，你们对此知之甚少，而我尚未准备好告诉你们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: These psychological forms or structures have a reality and validity, composed of gestalts that exist in perspectives that you do not recognize.
quotes.translation: 这些心理形式或结构具有真实性与有效性，由存在于你们尚未认知的视角中的完形所组成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This psychic gestalt may sound to you impersonal, but since its energy forms your person, how can this be?
quotes.translation: 这种心灵完形在你们听来可能显得非个人化，但既然其能量构成了你们的人格，这又如何可能呢？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Until it is studied as a multidimensional gestalt, it simply will not be understood.
quotes.translation: 除非将其作为多维完形来研究，否则它根本不会被理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json
